main_product.title: Hengguang 3 Pack Waterproof Dry Bag and 1Pack Phone Pouch,3L,5L,8L Lightweight Floating Dry Bag,Waterproof Stuff Sacks,Great for Kayaking,Hiking,Water Parks,Camping,Rafting,Wild Fishing

details.title: Hengguang 3 Pack Waterproof Dry Bag and 1Pack Phone Pouch,3L,5L,8L Lightweight Floating Dry Bag,Waterproof Stuff Sacks,Great for Kayaking,Hiking,Water Parks,Camping,Rafting,Wild Fishing
details.description:
• Designed for the toughest outdoor conditions ensuring durability and reliability
  • Enables smooth touch screen operation allowing you to use your smartphone without removing it from the bag
  • Suitable for all smartphones accommodating various models and sizes
  • Provides complete waterproof protection to keep your belongings safe and dry
  • Available in multiple sizes 3L 5L 8L to suit all your outdoor needs

all_reviews.reviewText: Great bags! love them. Wish I was able to buy 2 more before they sold out! I need them for a group and have to give 2 kids a different brand. Not happy about that.
all_reviews.itemName: Hengguang 3 Pack Waterproof Dry Bag and 1Pack Phone Pouch,3L,5L,8L Lightweight Floating Dry Bag,Waterproof Stuff Sacks,Great for Kayaking,Hiking,Water Parks,Camping,Rafting,Wild Fishing

all_reviews.reviewText: i have not yet tried out these bags in water, but I do like the bright, easy to find colprs, as well as the sizes offered in the pack. The phone bag was larger than most, accommodating phones in larger protection cases.
all_reviews.itemName: Hengguang 3 Pack Waterproof Dry Bag and 1Pack Phone Pouch,3L,5L,8L Lightweight Floating Dry Bag,Waterproof Stuff Sacks,Great for Kayaking,Hiking,Water Parks,Camping,Rafting,Wild Fishing

all_reviews.reviewText:
I bought these bags to make waterproof picnic kits to add to our camping gear.   In one bag, I have put a couple of sealed freeze dried meals, in another bag, I have a small cook kit with a pan to boil water for the freeze dried meals and dining ware to eat the meal.  The smallest bag will hold a small campstove and fuel.   The bags keep everything dry in the case of rain or flooding.  I have them all in a plastic tote that will go in the back of our truck.  

I love the bright colors so I can color code and know what color contains specific contents.  I also plan on putting together similar kits for my daughters and their families.

The smallest phone bag is fantastic.  I put it in the truck for my husband's phone.  When we are camping, we take the weather as it comes and this would be great to hold his phone while setting up camp.

All in al this is a great little set of bags that can be used for camping, canoeing or whitewater rafting.

I will be buying more.
all_reviews.itemName: Hengguang 3 Pack Waterproof Dry Bag and 1Pack Phone Pouch,3L,5L,8L Lightweight Floating Dry Bag,Waterproof Stuff Sacks,Great for Kayaking,Hiking,Water Parks,Camping,Rafting,Wild Fishing

all_reviews.reviewText: I needed a bag to protect our eyeglasses, phone and keys from getting wet and getting sand on it while we are at the beach. This serves its purpose. I love that it is lightweight and durable. Love the vibrant colors too!
all_reviews.itemName: Hengguang 3 Pack Waterproof Dry Bag and 1Pack Phone Pouch,3L,5L,8L Lightweight Floating Dry Bag,Waterproof Stuff Sacks,Great for Kayaking,Hiking,Water Parks,Camping,Rafting,Wild Fishing

all_reviews.reviewText: I purchased these for my next adventure but these have turned into great bags for putting swim items in afterwards, much environmentally friendly than using plastic bags, and most importantly they do keep things dry as described as well.
all_reviews.itemName: Hengguang 3 Pack Waterproof Dry Bag and 1Pack Phone Pouch,3L,5L,8L Lightweight Floating Dry Bag,Waterproof Stuff Sacks,Great for Kayaking,Hiking,Water Parks,Camping,Rafting,Wild Fishing

all_reviews.reviewText: The package comes with 3 good sized bags as well as a phone pouch! The bags are thinner than I thought but I can't wait to test them out and make sure they are water proof! I like the bright colors.
